name: RecoveryStorageOperationContracts
description: Typed backup, restore, evolution, status, validation, and activation contracts covering every durable Ledger type.
schema_def: backup.create and backup.verify produce or validate private artifacts, checksum manifest, schema, integrity, counts, transaction and relationship invariants, evidence uniqueness, decision-link consistency, statement coverage, dimension cardinality, exact totals and groups, history, and idempotency. restore.prepare and evolution.prepare create an isolated verified candidate and fingerprint without changing CURRENT. restore.activate and evolution.activate require explicit replacement authorization plus expected current and candidate fingerprints, revalidate under the exclusive lock, and atomically replace CURRENT. storage.status reports safe generation, schema, protection, and recovery metadata only. Stable errors distinguish integrity, incompatible schema or policy, stale candidate, activation conflict, host protection, disk, permission, and busy outcomes.
